title: K-200 Airframe Interface Control Document
text:
# K-200 Airframe Interface Control Document

Document number: MD-DOC-441-E. Revision: E. Type: ICD. Author: Dev Patel. Created: 2023-08-13. Last modified: 2024-03-30. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Airframe subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1166, P-1014, P-1062.
